DISCOVERY 301, JAN-23-2026 RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF GABRIEL WOLF TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL DISCOVERY RESPONSES. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SHADED FLAME LLC AND MAVEN COMMERCIAL, INC.'S MOTION FOR FURTHER WRITTEN DISCOVERY, VERIFICATIONS, AND SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO DELIVER TO DEPT. 301 A PAPER COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)
